channel.title: Daily Reader
channel.description: A page a day from my reading list.

item.title: Deep Learning — Pages 11–20/656
item.description: Contents Pr eface V Co ontent ts xi 1 The Deep l Learning Revolution 1 1.1 The In mpact of Deep Learning 2 1.1.1 Medical diagnosis 2 1.1.2 Protein structure 3 1.1.3 Image synthesis 4 1.1.4 Large language models 5 1.2 A Tut torial Example 6 1.2.1 Synthetic data 6 1.2.2 Linear models 8 1.2.3 Error fun...
